arts.sum: Join our Derby County WhatsApp group to get the latest Rams headlines sent straight to your phone. Asked if he would like to keep Yates beyond this summer, Eustace said : "I think Jerry has done very well - that is something we will discuss at the end of the year.”

arts.sum: Burnley enjoyed a weekend to remember as results elsewhere went their way, while they did their job by securing a hard-fought win.

arts.sum: Derby County defender Kane Wilson believes Pride Park could be the key to upsetting the odds when the Rams take on league leaders Burnley on Tuesday (7.45pm kick-off). Join our Derby County WhatsApp group to get the latest Rams headlines sent straight to your phone.

arts.ttl: 'We are fighting' - Liam Thompson on Derby County blip and now facing leaders Burnley - Derbyshire Live
arts.sum: Derby County's unbeaten run may have come to an end at Swansea City, but the Rams are determined to continue heading in the right direction with a strong performance against leaders Burnley at Pride Park. The Rams’ winning streak was ended by a 1-0 defeat to Swansea in the Championship on Saturday - a result that leaves them outside the relegation zone only on goal difference.

arts.ttl: 25 stunning pictures of Burnley fans celebrating Coventry City win and going top of the table
arts.sum: Just over 1,900 Burnley fans were in jubilant mood on Saturday as Scott Parker’s side recorded a hugely significant victory over Coventry City to move top of the table.

arts.sum: Chris Wilder has slammed a section of his own fans as an “absolute disgrace” after his Sheffield United players were abused after their weekend defeat at Oxford.
